# High-Level Design — Requirement-2

_Generated on 2025-11-13 13:00:54_

## Extracted Requirements (from PRD)

### NeoBank Digital – Loan Application & Approval Module

## 1. Document Control

*   Version: 1.0
*   Date: August 2025
*   Author: Product Team – NeoBank Digital
*   Reviewed By: Risk & Engineering Leads
*   Approved By: Chief Product Officer

## 2. Executive Summary

The Loan Application & Approval Module enables customers to browse loan products, submit applications digitally, and receive approval decisions quickly. This module integrates with credit bureaus and internal risk engines to automate eligibility checks and approval workflows. The goal is to improve loan origination efficiency, reduce manual interventions, and enhance the customer experience.

## 3. Objectives

*   Enable customers to apply for loans completely online.
*   Provide real-time eligibility checks and approval decisions.
*   Integrate seamlessly with external credit bureaus and internal risk engines.
*   Reduce manual processing by 50% within the first year.

## 4. Scope

### In-Scope

*   Loan product catalog (personal loans, home loans, auto loans).
*   Application submission (web & mobile).
*   Real-time credit bureau checks.
*   Internal risk scoring integration.
*   Automated approval/rejection workflows.
*   Document checklist for supporting documents (salary slips, bank statements).

### Out-of-Scope

*   Repayment management (handled by Loan Repayment Module).
*   Collections workflows.
*   Fraud monitoring (covered in Fraud & Risk Module).

## 5. Key Features

1.  Loan Product Catalog – display available products with terms & conditions.
2.  Application Form – guided step-by-step digital form.
3.  Eligibility Check – real-time bureau integration.
4.  Risk Scoring – internal engine for affordability & creditworthiness.
5.  Approval Workflow – automated decisioning engine.
6.  Document Submission – upload salary slips, bank statements, tax returns.
7.  Application Status Tracker – track progress (submitted, under review, approved).

## 6. User Stories

*   As a customer, I want to view loan products with clear terms so I can choose the right loan.
*   As a customer, I want to submit my application online so I don't need to visit a branch.
*   As a risk officer, I want the system to fetch bureau reports automatically so that I can reduce manual work.
*   As a customer, I want to track the status of my loan application in real time.

## 7. Integrations

*   Credit Bureau APIs – Experian, Equifax, TransUnion.
*   Internal Risk Engine – calculates risk scores.
*   Document Management Service – OCR & validation of uploaded documents.
*   Notification Service – SMS/Email for application updates.

## 8. Authentication & Security

*   Authentication: OAuth2.0 with MFA (mobile/email OTP).
*   Data Encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
*   Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for staff dashboards.
*   PII Handling: Strict logging and masking for sensitive fields.

## 9. Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs)

*   Performance: Loan eligibility check ≤ 3 seconds.
*   Availability: 99.9% uptime for loan application services.
*   Scalability: 50,000 concurrent applications supported.
*   Compliance: AML/KYC regulations, GDPR, PCI DSS for financial data.
*   Security: End-to-end encryption with audit logs.

## 10. Risks & Mitigations

| Risk                    | Impact                | Mitigation                                      |
| :---------------------- | :-------------------- | :---------------------------------------------- |
| Credit bureau downtime  | Delay in processing   | Implement failover to alternate bureau APIs     |
| Incorrect risk scoring  | Wrong approvals       | Regular audits of risk engine models            |
| Document upload failures | Application delays    | Multiple file format support & retry mechanism |
| High loan rejection rates | Customer dissatisfaction | Provide pre-eligibility checker in catalog      |

## 11. Success Metrics

*   Loan Application Completion Rate: ≥ 80%
*   Average Approval Decision Time: ≤ 2 minutes
*   Reduction in Manual Interventions: ≥ 50%
*   Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT): ≥ 4.5/5

## 12. Dependencies

*   Agreements with credit bureau partners.
*   Availability of internal risk scoring engine.
*   Integration with notification service.
*   Compliance approvals from legal and regulatory teams.

## 13. Timeline & Milestones

*   Week 1-2: Requirements finalization & design.
*   Week 3-5: Credit bureau API integration.
*   Week 6-7: Risk engine integration.
*   Week 8: Document management integration.
*   Week 9: Internal testing.
*   Week 10: UAT & compliance sign-off.
*   Week 11: Production rollout.

## 14. Appendix

*   Glossary of Terms:
    *   CSAT: Customer Satisfaction Score
    *   PII: Personally Identifiable Information
    *   AML: Anti-Money Laundering
*   Reference Standards: Basel Risk Guidelines, GDPR, RBI lending regulations.


## Authentication

```json
{
  "actors": [
    "customer",
    "risk_officer",
    "system"
  ],
  "flows": [
    "oauth2.0_login",
    "mfa_otp_verification",
    "role_based_access_control"
  ],
  "idp_options": [
    "neobank_idp",
    "third_party_idp"
  ],
  "threats": [
    "credential_stuffing",
    "account_takeover",
    "mfa_bypass",
    "insider_threat"
  ]
}
```


## Integrations

```json
[
  {
    "system": "experian",
    "purpose": "credit_bureau_check",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "oauth2.0",
    "endpoints": [
      "/credit_report"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "customer_name",
        "ssn",
        "address"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "credit_score",
        "credit_history"
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    "system": "equifax",
    "purpose": "credit_bureau_check",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "oauth2.0",
    "endpoints": [
      "/credit_report"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "customer_name",
        "ssn",
        "address"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "credit_score",
        "credit_history"
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    "system": "transunion",
    "purpose": "credit_bureau_check",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "oauth2.0",
    "endpoints": [
      "/credit_report"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "customer_name",
        "ssn",
        "address"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "credit_score",
        "credit_history"
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    "system": "internal_risk_engine",
    "purpose": "risk_scoring",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "api_key",
    "endpoints": [
      "/calculate_risk_score"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "credit_score",
        "income",
        "debt"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "risk_score",
        "approval_probability"
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    "system": "document_management_service",
    "purpose": "document_ocr_validation",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "oauth2.0",
    "endpoints": [
      "/ocr",
      "/validate"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "document_image",
        "document_type"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "extracted_text",
        "validation_results"
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    "system": "notification_service",
    "purpose": "application_updates",
    "protocol": "api",
    "auth": "api_key",
    "endpoints": [
      "/send_sms",
      "/send_email"
    ],
    "data_contract": {
      "inputs": [
        "phone_number",
        "email_address",
        "message"
      ],
      "outputs": [
        "status"
      ]
    }
  }
]
```

## Use Cases

```json
[
  "Customer views available loan products and their terms.",
  "Customer submits a loan application online.",
  "System performs real-time eligibility check with credit bureaus.",
  "System calculates risk score using internal risk engine.",
  "System automatically approves or rejects the loan application.",
  "Customer uploads supporting documents (salary slips, bank statements).",
  "Customer tracks the status of their loan application.",
  "Risk officer reviews bureau reports."
]
```


## Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs)

```json
{
  "security": [
    "Enforce OAuth2.0 with MFA for authentication.",
    "Encrypt data at rest with AES-256.",
    "Encrypt data in transit with TLS 1.3.",
    "Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).",
    "Mask and log PII appropriately.",
    "Comply with AML/KYC regulations, GDPR, and PCI DSS."
  ],
  "reliability": [
    "Maintain 99.9% uptime for loan application services.",
    "Implement failover mechanisms for credit bureau integrations.",
    "Ensure data consistency across all integrated systems.",
    "Provide robust error handling and logging."
  ],
  "performance": [
    "Complete loan eligibility check within 3 seconds.",
    "Process loan applications with minimal latency.",
    "Ensure the system supports 50,000 concurrent applications.",
    "Optimize database queries for fast data retrieval."
  ],
  "operability": [
    "Provide comprehensive monitoring and alerting.",
    "Automate deployment and rollback procedures.",
    "Implement robust logging and auditing capabilities.",
    "Design for easy maintenance and upgrades."
  ],
  "usability": [],
  "maintainability": [],
  "compliance": []
}
```


## Risks & Assumptions

```json
[
  {
    "id": "R1",
    "desc": "Credit bureau downtime impacts application processing.",
    "assumption": "Credit bureaus are generally reliable but outages can occur.",
    "mitigation": "Implement failover to alternate credit bureau APIs.",
    "impact": 4,
    "likelihood": 3
  },
  {
    "id": "R2",
    "desc": "Incorrect risk scoring leads to inaccurate loan approvals.",
    "assumption": "The internal risk engine is accurate and up-to-date.",
    "mitigation": "Conduct regular audits of risk engine models and data.",
    "impact": 5,
    "likelihood": 2
  },
  {
    "id": "R3",
    "desc": "Document upload failures cause application delays.",
    "assumption": "Customers can easily upload required documents.",
    "mitigation": "Support multiple file formats and implement a retry mechanism.",
    "impact": 3,
    "likelihood": 3
  },
  {
    "id": "R4",
    "desc": "High loan rejection rates lead to customer dissatisfaction.",
    "assumption": "Customers understand the loan eligibility criteria.",
    "mitigation": "Provide a pre-eligibility checker in the loan product catalog.",
    "impact": 4,
    "likelihood": 2
  },
  {
    "id": "R5",
    "desc": "Security breach exposes sensitive customer data.",
    "assumption": "Security measures are sufficient to protect customer data.",
    "mitigation": "Implement robust security controls, including encryption and access controls.",
    "impact": 5,
    "likelihood": 1
  },
  {
    "id": "R6",
    "desc": "Integration issues with the document management service.",
    "assumption": "The document management service is stable and reliable.",
    "mitigation": "Thoroughly test the integration and implement error handling.",
    "impact": 3,
    "likelihood": 2
  },
  {
    "id": "R7",
    "desc": "Compliance violations lead to fines and penalties.",
    "assumption": "The system complies with all relevant regulations.",
    "mitigation": "Regularly review and update the system to ensure compliance.",
    "impact": 5,
    "likelihood": 1
  },
  {
    "id": "R8",
    "desc": "System downtime impacts loan application processing.",
    "assumption": "The system is highly available.",
    "mitigation": "Implement redundancy and failover mechanisms.",
    "impact": 4,
    "likelihood": 2
  }
]
```
